hero.title: Training & Education
hero.subtitle: Industry-standard and bespoke training for your workforce.
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk provides industry-standard training packages and designs bespoke training courses to meet the specific needs of your company. We have established links with many leading training providers and can offer face-to-face IOSH, CIEH, and ISO accredited training courses delivered at your workplace.

overview.heading: Accredited Training, Your Way
overview.description: Whether you need nationally accredited qualifications or bespoke courses built around your specific operations and hazards, we deliver practical training that your people will actually retain and apply. All courses can be delivered face-to-face at your workplace to suit your requirements.

features.title: Accredited Courses
features.description: Face-to-face IOSH, CIEH, and ISO accredited training courses delivered at your workplace through our established links with leading training providers.

features.title: Bespoke Training
features.description: Custom-designed courses tailored to your company's specific needs, covering your industry hazards, procedures, and compliance requirements.

features.title: First Aid Training
features.description: Accredited face-to-face first aid training and renewal courses including 3-day First Aid at Work, Paediatric First Aid, Emergency First Aid, AED, and Mental Health First Aid.

sectors.heading: Course Range
sectors.description: Our range of courses includes but is not limited to the following. All can be delivered at your workplace to meet your requirements.

firstAid.heading: Accredited First Aid Training
firstAid.description: We provide face-to-face accredited first aid training and renewal courses. We also offer accredited mental health first aid training.

steps.title: Training Needs Analysis
steps.description: Assessing your workforce competence requirements against regulatory obligations, risk profiles, and operational needs to identify priority training areas.

steps.title: Course Design & Delivery
steps.description: Selecting from our accredited course range or designing bespoke programmes, then delivering face-to-face at your workplace to suit your schedule.

steps.title: Certification & Renewal
steps.description: Issuing certifications where applicable and managing refresher schedules to ensure your team maintains ongoing competence and compliance.

cta.heading: Upskill Your Team
cta.description: From accredited first aid to bespoke safety courses, we'll design a training programme that works for your business and keeps your people competent and confident.
